filter_reason: Domain-specific VQA benchmark for dashcam/autonomous-driving incident understanding - an application vertical, not a result that moves the general capability or orchestration picture.
title: AUTOPILOT VQA: Benchmarking Vision-Language Models for Incident-Centric Dashcam Understanding
excerpt: Recent advances in Vision-Language Models, Large Language Models, and Multimodal Large Language Models have improved autonomous driving tasks such as scene understanding, decision making, trajectory prediction, and visual question answering. However, evaluating whether these models can reliably reason about safety-critical incidents remains challenging. To address this gap, we present AUTOPILOT-VQA, an incident-centric visual question answering benchmark for dashcam video understanding.
